data.title: Kamala Harris Endorsed By Insane Clown Posse Rapper: 'I Want Her To Win Because She's A Democrat'
data.description: Vice President Kamala Harris received an endorsement from Violent J of Insane Clown Posse, who expressed support for her during an appearance on "The Daily Show."

data.title: Elon Musk Used This Single Word To Describe The Steady Growth Of Revenue In Tesla's Q3 Revenue
data.description: Elon Musk highlighted Tesla's steady third-quarter revenue growth, reaching $25.2 billion in 2024, up from $31.2 million in 2010, calling it "progress" on Wednesday.

data.title: Ozempic And Wegovy Maker Novo Nordisk Asks FDA To Halt Production Of Compounded Fat Loss Drugs Due To Their 'Inherent Complexity'
McDonald's Where Trump Worked Review-Bombed On Yelp: 'Fries Too Salty As If Someone Who Lost A Major Election Had Been Crying Over Them'
data.description: Fans and critics of Donald Trump took to Yelp to leave 1-star and 5-star reviews on a Pennsylvania McDonald's location the former president worked at recently.

data.title: Roche's Q3 Sales Surge Led By Ocrevus, Vabysmo, Urges Regulators To Block Novo Holdings' $16.5B Catalent Acquisition
data.description: Roche reported a 9% increase in third-quarter sales, driven by strong performance from Ocrevus and Vabysmo. Roche also raised concerns over the Catalent acquisition.
